2401980.name: RPG Developer Bakin Glowing Crystal Pack
2401980.description:
This pack of crystals is essential for RPGs.
They can be used to decorate fantastic cave landscapes or be seen as symbols of religious facilities.
Use them as minerals that can be mined, or use them as prominent save points.
The glowing crystals can be used at various points in the game.

Stamps with and without outlines are also available, so you can use them according to the art style of your project.

[Glowing Crystal Pack - Contents]
-- 3D Stamps
With Outline: 35
Without Outline: 35 (Material difference from with outline)

-- Terrain Stamp: 1

-- Sample Map: 1
